name: appservicios-mobile-shell
description: Capacitor wrapper para publicar AppServicios en Android y iOS.

scripts.android:apk: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr&& set PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%&& cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:aab: set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr&& set PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%&& cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
